label: Centro Estetico

beats.name: HOOK
beats.video_prompt: Italian esthetician seated across from client, pen in hand, paper consent form on table. Client thinking about allergies. Form has wrong name written on edge, already half-detached. Behind the counter: a stack of forty or fifty client folders, all similar but all different. Warm spa-like interior, soft diffused light, intimate close-up, documentary feel, slightly desaturated, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: PROBLEM
beats.video_prompt: Hands flipping through client folders. One falls, papers scatter on floor. Someone picks them up, puts them back randomly. Then: a Treatwell receipt showing 340 euro for last month. Soft but troubled light, intimate documentary close-up, shallow DOF, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: In Italia ci sono novantadue mila centri estetici. La scheda controindicazioni e un obbligo di legge. Se usi un prodotto sbagliato su una cliente con un'allergia che non ricordavi, quella cartella e la tua responsabilita. E Treatwell prende il venticinque percento su novantamila euro di fatturato: ventiduemila e cinquecento euro.

beats.name: AGITATION
beats.video_prompt: Stack of disorganized paper client files on beauty salon desk. One open folder showing handwritten allergy notes, barely legible. Soft harsh light creating shadows, still camera, uncomfortable silence, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: SOLUTION
beats.video_prompt: Same esthetician working confidently, skilled hands on client who is relaxed. Tablet nearby shows complete client profile: last visit 3 weeks ago, treatment lifting viso, note 'allergia nichel confermata, evitare strumenti magnetici'. Everything clear and safe. Warm golden spa light, saturated warm tones, elegant smooth dolly, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Con FLUXION, la scheda estetica e digitale. Controindicazioni, reazioni, trattamenti, consenso firmato. Sul tuo computer, non su server di nessuno. I tuoi clienti sono tuoi, non di una piattaforma. Zero abbonamenti. Zero commissioni.
FLUXION. Quattrocentonovantasette euro. Una volta. Per sempre.

lines.text: Il gestionale che non ti costa ogni mese

video_gen_config.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermarks, logos, brand names, blurry, distorted faces, low quality, overexposed, artifacts, generic stock footage, CGI, artificial
video_gen_config.style_prefix: Cinematic 4K, elegant spa aesthetic, authentic Italian beauty center, warm intimate documentary

music_gen_config.genre_hint: elegant spa-like, ambient pads with soft piano, relaxing luxury

prompts.tense: uneasy spa ambient, soft dissonant pads, subtle tension, delicate but troubled, minor key, 70bpm, no vocals
prompts.uplifting: elegant spa resolution, warm ambient pads, soft piano melody, serene luxury, major key, 95bpm, no vocals

wa_message:
Ciao [nome], su 90k di fatturato Treatwell prende 22.500 euro.
FLUXION costa 497 una volta.
[VIDEO]
